# Least-Mean-Square Estimation

**Summary**: A signal processing technique used to estimate a known signal's parameters or remove noise from a data stream.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2009-al-lehyani|Al-Lehyani, 2009]] applied least mean square estimation to determine the diffracted wavelet for subtraction.

## Key Results and Findings

- The algorithm successfully estimated and subtracted the diffracted wavelets in Model A, even with minor overlap between diffractors. ([[2009-al-lehyani|Al-Lehyani, 2009, p. 64]])
